description: Multi-agent workflow for researching, consolidating, writing, refining, translating, and generating visuals for technical articles with OpenAI.

agents.name: Agent 1 - Web Researcher
agents.purpose: Research 3 trustworthy and relevant sources for the given topic.

agents.name: Agent 2 - Consolidator
agents.purpose: Consolidate the selected sources into a single clear foundation.

agents.name: Agent 3 - Summarizer
agents.purpose: Turn the consolidated material into a strategic summary for the article.

agents.name: Agent 4 - Writer
agents.purpose: Write the full technical article in Markdown.

agents.name: Agent 5 - Final Editor
agents.purpose: Refine the article and generate the editorial package for publication.

agents.name: Agent 6 - EN Translator
agents.purpose: Translate the final editorial package into English.

agents.name: Agent 7 - Image Generator
agents.purpose: Generate a professional cover image based on the editorial prompt.
